title: elaphoglossum vagans
intro: Elaphoglossum vagans is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the vagrant elaphoglossum. This plant is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum vagans include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Elaphoglossum vagans can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal remedy.
